offer: For property managers processing 5–15 invoices/month, late rent payments cause cash flow gaps. We automate late notice reminders instead of manual tracking of rent payments and reminders.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Participate in community forums for property management
try_it: Let users try manual entry of tenant payment data
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
